currentTask: Phase 7 — GRN + invoice + 3-way match + payment tracking per §9
nextAction: Phase 7 (§22.7 prompt 7): GRN + invoice + 3-way match + payment tracking per §9 — GRN: WAREHOUSE picks an open PO (SENT/PARTIALLY_RECEIVED), outstanding qty per line, over-receipt blocked beyond tolerance (default 0%), optional QC accepted/rejected + reason (rejected reopens PO line), partial deliveries (multiple GRNs per PO), PO status auto-updates PARTIALLY_RECEIVED/RECEIVED, GRN acceptance is a §19 signature (meaning RECEIVED). Invoice (ACCOUNTANT): enter vendor invoice against PO, lines default from received-not-invoiced qty, 3-way match PO price/qty vs GRN accepted vs invoice (tolerance qty 0% price 2%), MATCHED/MISMATCH per line, mismatch needs ACCOUNTANT override with comment (Exception TOLERANCE_OVERRIDE), invoice verify = signature (VERIFIED). Payment tracking: due date from terms, mark paid/partially paid (signature PAID), aging buckets 0-30/31-60/61-90/90+. Budget: PR approval commits, PO approval moves commitment, invoice match moves to spent (lib/budget). npm run check + seed + browser E2E, Phase Report, commit phase-7.
